name: Chocolate Mint Cake # 2
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 10x15 inch pan.
Melt butter; add cocoa; stir and set aside. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking soda, peppermint schnapps and butter mixture; beat well. Add eggs and sweetened condensed milk; beat for two minutes. Pour into prepared pan. Bake for twenty minutes.
FROSTING: Beat all ingredients together well; spread over cake.
